title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - `Happy auth-stale` recovery is still missing **production-like smoke completion** by plan itself. The implementation plan keeps this unchecked (`Run production-like smoke checks...`) and still has an open auth-boundary decision. [implementation-plan](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md):19 [implementation-plan](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md):47 - Current tests are mostly **mocked runtime** rather than live environment validation. `test-auth-stale-reauth-smoke.js` stubs `endpointClient.fetchJson` and `global.fetch` for `/api/cockpit/auth/login`. [auth-stale-smoke](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-stale-reauth-smoke.js):111 [auth-stale-smoke](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-stale-reauth-smoke.js):202 - Production evidence for Cockpit auth is still a **route/probe check with invalid credentials**, not an end-to-end reauth success flow from Happy. [live-cutover](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-live-cutover-status-2026-03-06.md):58 [peripheral-audit](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/cursorvers-production-peripheral-audit-2026-03-07.md):57 - Runtime config is environment-driven (meta/global config), so deployment validation is still required for endpoint correctness (`state/events/intake/recovery/auth login/refresh`). [runtime-config](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/config/happy-runtime-config.js):27 [runtime-config](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/config/happy-runtime-config.js):54 [index-meta](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html):12 - Auth route config is currently `auth-entry` + password login endpoint, with `auth-access-url` empty in shipped HTML; if Access path is intended in prod, this requires runtime/config validation outside current tests. [index-meta](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html):24 [auth-index-meta](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/index.html):13 - Mobile operational docs still list **GitHub Mobile issue/comment** as the production-safe entry surface, implying Happy path still needs operational hardening before becoming primary. [mobile-workflow](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-mobile-content-workflow.md):19 - Missing automated check: no test currently exercises `app.js` reauth action wiring (`beginReauthentication`, `persistResumeState`, `window.location.assign`) from the main UI flow. [app-reauth](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js):160 [tests-search](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh):15 - Missing automated check: login failure UX path in gateway (`submitButton.disabled` reset + error status) exists in code but is not explicitly asserted by runtime tests. [auth-gateway](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js):118 [auth-gateway](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js):132 - Missing automated check: PWA test only asserts registration/static shell markers; no automated verification of SW cache behavior around auth pages / stale shell after auth-config change. [test-pwa-shell](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh):6 [sw](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/sw.js):52 - Missing automated check: real-browser/iPhone-specific auth recovery (Safari PWA + localStorage/BroadcastChannel/lock fallback behavior) is not covered; current coverage is simulated in Node harness. [test-endpoint-client](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js):129 [test-auth-gateway-runtime](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-gateway-runtime.js):114
